name: Ambetter Health 400
comments: Daniel Suarez has won the Ambetter Health 400 at Atlanta Motor Speedway, his second career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 22 (Rule 14.3.1.1 Violation), No. 9 (Unapproved Adjustments).
